title: Smart Shulker Unboxer
description: Open, view, and swap items inside Shulker Boxes directly from your hand with a simple right-click or hotkey!
body:
# 📦 Smart Shulker Unboxer
Tired of constantly placing down Shulker Boxes, opening them, and breaking them back up just to grab a single item? **Smart Shulker Unboxer** is a lightweight, performance-friendly utility mod that completely eliminates inventory management tediousness by letting you access your Shulker Boxes right from your hand!

Whether you are building massive structures, sorting your storage, or exploring the End, managing your resources has never been this seamless.

---

## ✨ Features
* **Right-Click to Open:** Simply hold any colored or standard Shulker Box in your main hand and right-click into the air to peer inside instantly.
* **Custom Hotkey Support:** Don't want to accidentally interact with block faces? Press **`X`** (you can change this in your **(Controls>Key Binds)** menu) while holding a Shulker Box to open its interface instantly.
* **Full Item Swapping:** This isn't just a preview tool! Shift-click, drag, and swap items between your player inventory and the Shulker Box container natively.
* **Vanilla Parity:** Fully supports native container interactions, updates item data safely, and plays the classic Shulker Box open/close sound effects.
* **Pure Client-Server Safety:** Built utilizing Minecraft's modern data component engine, ensuring your item data syncs safely without risks of duplication or lost items.

---

## 🔌Dependencies
To run this mod smooothly,make sure you the following installed:
* **Fabric API:** Required
* **Fabric Loader:** Required

---

## 🎮 How to Use
* Place a **Shulker Box** into your main inventory hand.
* **Right-click** or press **`X`** on your keyboard.
* Manage your items exactly like a placed Shulker Box, close the screen, and keep moving!
* **NOTE:** If the **`X`** keybind is not working,change it in settings--\>Controls--\>Key binds,as it maybe set for other function.

---

## 🛠️ Compatibility & Versions
* **Mod Loader:** Fabric* **Minecraft Compatibility:** Look at the **Versions** tab to download the specific file optimized for your game version (Supports `1.21 - 1.21.1` and `1.21.11`).
* **Server Dependency:** This mod needs to be installed on the server (or in your single-player world) to safely sync container contents to your inventory item components
